verse_text: So My sheep were scattered, because there were no shepherds. So they became food for all the wild animals of the field.

links.context: Jesus does not condemn sinners, but sees them as lost sheep to be found and brought home. Compassion means "suffering with." The illustration of sheep having no shepherd, drawn from the OT ([[NUM.27:17]]; 3Kg 22:17; [[EZK.34:5]]), is an accusation against the Jewish leaders who, charged with the duty of shepherds, acted as wolves.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
